Many local women prominent
In the cause of woman's suffrage
have expressed their thanks to The
Press for the interest II has taken
In the question by running q ballot
In this paper, and have expressed
their willingness to talk on the sub
Ject. Tho ballots are being re.
-ceIved In every mail.


"Taxation without representation
is tyranny" said Mrs. George c.
Campbell, a member OF the Wom-
ans Suffrage club. zone Of the
principal reasons, to my mind, why
women should have right to vote
is because they pay taxes. For
eigners are allowed to come into
this country and after they have
become na.uralixed In a years time
they are allowed to say how our
money shall be dispensed. They
are often Italians and Cinnamon
who are absolutely Ignorant In
every respect.


"At the present time in Louisiana
they have the old Napoleon law,
which deprives women who have

bands. Yet men can buy and sell

This Is the main reason why !
think women should vote. II they
pay taxes they should have q voice
In the use of the money"


Mrs. A. f. Rogers believes i'm
plicitly In the right of women to
vote. "The question of vital inter-
est to me-" said Mrs. Rogers. sis
that of morality. l believe when
the women are given the power to
vote they will influence a great
wave of morality to sweep the
country.

believe women should have the
vote Is that every person who owns
